item.title: Pitch to Portfolio: Lioness Jill Scott's investing game plan
item.description: After bringing football home as a Lioness, Jill Scott discusses how she transformed her finances and became an investor in this latest episode of Mone...

item.title: UK unemployment hits highest level since 2021 – will interest rate cuts follow?
item.description: UK unemployment reached its highest rate in almost five years by the end of 2025. Is AI to blame and will the Bank of England step in with an interest...

item.title: UK inflation fell to 3.0% in January
item.description: After rising in December 2025, UK inflation resumed its downward trajectory in January 2026

item.title: Could Chinese investments race ahead in the Year of the Horse?
item.description: As the Year of the Horse begins, we highlight the trends and sectors that could make great Chinese investments for the coming Lunar year

item.title: Can mining stocks deliver golden gains?
item.description: With gold and silver prices having outperformed the stock markets last year, mining stocks can be an effective, if volatile, means of gaining exposure
